text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally Friday. I'm finishing up the last bit of work and getting
ready for afternoon training when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump, thump, thump!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Buuuuuenos tardeeesss! How're you doin', Trainer!
choice_data_list: I see you're as excited as ever, El.
I see you're as excited as ever, El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yup, I'm always full of energy! Whether I'm on the turf or not, I'm
always going full throttle!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Are you feelin' a bit under the weather, Trainer? But we were just
about to start training!
choice_data_list: I guess the fatigue is catching up to me...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! How come?! What happened?! The sun's out—it's way too early
to be burning out!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, aren't we aiming to be the world's strongest?! If we aren't
peppy, then what are we?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now, suck in your gut! Then, breathe in! Get that fresh air into your
lungs!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Look alive, Trainer—we're goin' on a run!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! I always run when I'm energetic! Which means that running makes
you energetic! C'mon, let's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Uno, dos, tres! Raise those thighs! Match your cadence to my rhythm!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Right! Just like that! Next up, fly with me through the sky!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Shout! Leap! Let the fires of passion burn bright! Good, we've only
got ten laps to go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we finish our impromptu training session with El as my trainer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno! I'm glad I picked you as my trainer! We make a good team!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I really felt your passion on that final lap. I'm proud of you. You get
an A+!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Haaahahaha! You're very welcome! We worked up a good sweat,
didn't we? Another productive day of training—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh? Training?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I haven't done any training yet today!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Quickly, speedily—swiftly! Let us sound the gong! Now's when the
real training beg—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding-dong, bing-bong...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! The bell! But that means—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This week was a real doozy. Hey, wanna hit up the convenience store?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: You know it. I just wanna grab something sweet and chill.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-wha?! Everyone's leaving the track... Don't tell me... Is it
already time to go home?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer, does that mean we're finished too?
choice_data_list: I can keep you company for a bit longer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Traaainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gah, I'm so happy! I'm glad I picked you as my trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to get back into gear and start training! Let's run
towards the setting sun until that riverbank—no, until the sea!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I know, I know. Don't worry so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Training with El is a lot of fun, but I wonder if I'll be able to walk
tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: What're you spacin' out for, Trainer?! I'll leave you behind!
